_comment: SINZU reviews. Add new reviews as objects in the array below and redeploy to publish. Reviews submitted via the site's Write a Review form are emailed to the owner (formatted for copy-paste) — moderate then paste here.

reviews.title: This is my third order
reviews.content: I found $INZU at Northtown last year and haven't stopped shopping. Every piece feels intentional. The shipping was fast too.

reviews.title: Real customer service
reviews.content: Called with a question about my bonnet order and got an actual person. That doesn't happen much anymore. Product was exactly as described.

reviews.title: Beautiful, would order again
reviews.content: Packaging felt premium. Only reason for 4 stars is I wish there were more color options — hopefully at Mall of America you'll expand!

reviews.title: Wore it every day this month
reviews.content: The gold tone hasn't faded at all. I get compliments constantly. Worth every dollar.

reviews.title: The satin is real
reviews.content: You can tell the difference between cheap satin and the good stuff. This is the good stuff. My hair stays smooth all night.

reviews.title: Cleared my skin up
reviews.content: I've used African black soap from other brands and this one is authentic. Cleared up my breakouts within two weeks. Follow with the shea butter.

reviews.title: Great scent, lasts a while
reviews.content: The shea butter melts nicely on the skin and the vanilla amber scent is subtle, not overpowering. A little goes a long way.
